title: AI Release and Evaluation — Order Support & Returns Assistant
description: Template dashboard (import via Datadog UI/API). Regression pass rate, golden-set accuracy, canary health, release/rollback log. Adapt metric names to your actual instrumentation — see ../README.md.
caveat: regression_pass_rate and golden_set_accuracy come from a scheduled evaluation-harness run, not live production traces — wire this to your eval pipeline's own metrics endpoint, not APM.
